name: Receipt-Gated Access Agent
description: Generic access gate for rooms, files, commands, feeds, and drops using DNA x402 receipt verification.
whatItDoes: Requests a receipt before access is granted.
Verifies the receipt and fee waterfall.
Unlocks the target room, command, feed, report, or file.
feeBehavior: Every access fee is visible before payment and bound to receipt.
cursorPrompt: Build a Receipt-Gated Access Agent using DNA x402. Quote access, verify receipt, unlock the room/file/command/feed, log receipt ID, and never implement backend custody or backend signing.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Receipt-Gated Access Agent using DNA x402. Quote access, verify receipt, unlock the room/file/command/feed, log receipt ID, and never implement backend custody or backend signing.
receiptProofBehavior: Fee waterfall is verified before unlock.
